metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_73
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Using two different antibodies in immunofluorescence and immuno-electron microscopy it is shown that CtBP2 is present in the presynaptic cytosol at synapses in the cerebellum. Although the antibodies do not discriminate between different gene products of CtBP2, the gene product RIBEYE was not detected in brain lysates. It is thus assumed that the detected protein is CtBP2 or CtBP2-S.

13.3.2017 Pim:
- Literal: "To this end we utilized antibodies specific to either CtBP1 or CtBP2. The antibodies did, however, recognize all isoforms known to date expressed from the individual genes. However, as the specific antibody to ribbon-specific CtBP2 variant RIBEYE did not show any signal in homogenates from whole brain (data not shown), the signals described here are most likely derived from the long and short isoforms of CtBP1 and CtBP2.". Experimental description: Brains of adult C57/BL6 mice of mixed sex were used in all biochemical experiments and for preparation of brain slices
